productDisplayName: Peter England Men Statements Tan Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11.2 cm X 9.2 cmHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the left side of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA buttoned pocket on the right sideA flap on the left side with three credit card slots on one side and a mesh pocket on the otherBranding embossed on the frontHorizontal stitch detailing along the walletCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
